Industry Relations and Collaborations

Industry Relations and Collaborations

With the transition to the Project-Based New Education Model, the Department of New Media and Communication has been strengthening its existing collaborations with leading industry institutions such as Facebook, Dağ Medya, Pikan Ajans, Olmadık Projeler, Contentus, Podfresh, and Teyit.org. In this model, industry partners play active roles in the definition, implementation, and evaluation of student projects.

Prominent figures from the industry contribute to our courses as sector partners; they join classes as guest speakers to share their expertise and experiences, provide feedback and commentary that supports students in developing ideas and producing projects, and lead workshops in their areas of specialization to enhance students’ professional growth.

These collaborations and industry relations help our students build strong professional networks and benefit from future career opportunities offered within the sector.

International Collaborations

Our department has established Erasmus agreements with various universities across Europe.

For more detailed information about Erasmus partnerships, please visit:

https://www.khas.edu.tr/en/global/
